set.xpath: //quest[starts-with(@id, 'waka_zs_quest_')]/reward[@type='Item' and (contains(@id,'BulletHP') or contains(@id,'HIpower') or contains(@id,'Highpower') or contains(@id,'Eft') and (contains(@id,'HP') or contains(@id,'RIP')))]/@value
//quest[starts-with(@id, 'waka_zs_quest_')]/reward[@type='Item' and (contains(@id,'BulletAP') or contains(@id,'Armor') or contains(@id,'Eft') and contains(@id,'AP') or @id='ammoJunkTurretAP')]/@value

//quest[starts-with(@id, 'waka_zs_quest_')]/reward[@type='Item' and (@id='ammo25mmGrenadeTraining' or @id='ammo25mmGrenadeFRAGS' or @id='ammo25mmGrenadeHE' or @id='ammoEft4046381' or @id='ammoEft4046576' or @id='ammoEft4053vog25' or @id='ammoEftGrenadeAir')]/@value
